== Notes for [[Item:Q88135|Q88135]] ==

See sourced citations for his son. https://www.geni.com/people/Consul-298-BC-Lucius-Cornelius-Scipio-Barbatus/6000000042171376049

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F2940C9D8E31EFBBE49822EF79916C010C
geni:6000000042179962000

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
